query: SELECT rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN npc_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_npc FROM game_unified_skill_catalog WHERE usable_by_player = 1 GROUP BY rarity
